description: End-to-end fixture for the Autotools CDB-generation path: a pristine GNU Autotools project (no ./configure committed) that forces BearGenerator._run_autotools to invoke autoreconf -i -> configure -> bear -- make clean all, then feeds the resulting compile_commands.json to clangd.
_notes: All fields below were pinned from an empirical run of StaticAnalyzer against this project on macOS (autoconf 2.73, automake 1.18.1, bear 4.1.1, clangd via Homebrew). expected_hierarchy is intentionally empty: CallGraphBuilder currently runs with skip_hierarchy=True, so the hierarchy tests are skipped upstream; we keep the key so the fixture shape matches its siblings.
